error_signature: Client network socket disconnected before secure TLS connection was established
title: Email node fails due to TLS connection issue
symptom: The send email node takes a long time to process and outputs an error stating 'Client network socket disconnected before secure TLS connection was established'.
not_this_if: Error occurs only with specific email accounts
root_cause: The error occurs due to the Docker container not properly establishing a secure TLS connection to the Office365 SMTP server. This can be caused by network configuration issues, such as DNS resolution or TLS version compatibility.
fix_steps: Add the environment variable 'NODE_OPTIONS=--dns-result-order=ipv4first --tls-max-v1.2' to your Docker compose file.
Restart the Docker container to apply the changes.
Test the send email node again to confirm it works.
agent_instruction: Update your Docker compose file with the necessary NODE_OPTIONS and restart the container.
